Google just dropped Gemini Omni at I/O 2026 — its first "anything from anything" AI video model. Gemini Omni Flash is live today inside the Gemini app, Flow, and YouTube Shorts. Real physics, character consistency, and conversational editing inside one shipping product.

What you will see in this 3-minute breakdown:

• Physics reasoning — gravity, kinetic energy, fluid dynamics inside one model
• Character consistency across any scene, lighting, and action
• Conversational editing — nudge the clip by talking, no full regen
• Four shipping surfaces today: Gemini App, Flow, YouTube Shorts, API soon
• Reimagine your own footage — Omni transforms clips you already shot
• Veo 3.1 is gone — Omni Flash is the new Google video default

Google blog post: https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-omni/
Gemini video-generation overview: https://gemini.google/overview/video-generation/
Google DeepMind X post: https://x.com/GoogleDeepMind
Google I/O 2026: https://io.google/2026/

Anything from anything — real shift, or marketing slogan? Drop your take below.
